company.name: Ed Napleton Automotive Group
company.about: Multi-location automotive dealership group with over 50 dealership locations and franchised brands including Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Acura, Honda, Genesis, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, Alfa Romeo, Hyundai, Kia, Maserati, and others; operates service and repair departments at its dealerships; headquartered in Oakbrook Terrace, IL, USA; established in 1931; brand mix includes Korean and luxury German franchises.

evaluations.criterion: Brand mix includes Korean (Hyundai/Genesis/Kia) or luxury/German franchises, or shows documented high warranty/service-documentation activity
evaluations.reasoning: The Ed Napleton Automotive Group’s franchise list on the locations page includes Korean brands Hyundai, Genesis, and Kia, as well as luxury German brands such as Mercedes‑Benz, BMW, and Porsche. This satisfies the criterion of having a brand mix that includes Korean or luxury/German franchises. The presence of these brands is directly documented in the company’s publicly available website.

references.title: Ed Napleton Automotive Group New Used vehicles

evaluations.criterion: Operates service and fixed-operations (repair / multi-point inspection) departments at its dealerships

As a further convenience, certified preowned vehicles must pass a multi-point inspection. To be considered a certified used car, the car must pass every test. The inspections typically cover all of the cars mechanical and electronic components, tires, and shocks. Interiors and exterior are also inspected for damage and excessive wear. If the car does not meet the standards of the manufacturer, it will be refurbished so that it can be approved.

### Who We Are

Berkshire Hathaway Automotive is one of the largest dealership groups in America, with over [100 franchises in 10 states](https://www.berkshirehathawayautomotive.com/locations/index.htm), including Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Indiana, Missouri, Nebraska, New Mexico and Texas.

[About Us](https://www.berkshirehathawayautomotive.com/about/index.htm)

### Join The Team

We welcome you to join a winning team that cares about your development. We take the best and brightest talent, and cultivate their success with ongoing training, mentoring and leadership opportunities.

[View Careers](https://www.berkshirehathawayautomotive.com/careers/index.htm)

![](https://pictures.dealer.com/b/berkshirehathawayautomotive/0401/d8ead334c8420a1db657e633984c9f0dx.jpg)

![](https://pictures.dealer.com/b/berkshirehathawayautomotive/1057/8e1c8d8e19f8fd6182b2d6a4679225f5x.jpg)

### Protect Your Investment

Through [MPP Company](https://www.berkshirehathawayautomotive.com/mpp/index.htm), Berkshire Hathaway Automotive affiliated dealerships are able to offer auto retail customers a unique, industry-leading portfolio of proprietary vehicle service and ancillary contracts, which are insured by its two insurance underwriters, Old United Casualty Company and Old United Life Insurance Company.

[Warranty Plans](https://www.berkshirehathawayautomotive.com/mpp/index.htm)

#### Welcome to Our Service Department

At Craig Zinn Automotive Group, our highly qualified technicians are here to provide exceptional service in a timely manner. From oil changes to transmission replacements, we are dedicated to maintaining top tier customer service, for both new and pre-owned car buyers! Allow our staff to demonstrate our commitment to excellence.

#### What Happens After I Schedule an Appointment?

Please use our online form to schedule your next service appointment, or call . We are standing by to answer your questions and get you in the door as quickly as possible. Upon submitting your information we will:

- Respond to you promptly via your preferred contact method.
- Ask any additional questions required to service your vehicle.

Fields Motorcars Chicago

834 N RUSH ST Chicago , IL 60611-2031

We are proud to serve our customers in Florida, Illinois, Wisconsin, Washington, and North Carolina. Family owned and operated, Fields Auto began with the opening of Fields Cadillac in Evanston, IL in 1971.

Currently, we represent MINI, BMW, Bentley Motors, Cadillac, Chrysler, Dodge, Jaguar, Jeep, Karma, Lamborghini, Land Rover & Range Rover, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Ram Trucks, McLaren, Rolls-Royce, Sprinter, Volvo Cars, and Mazda. We also carry an extensive selection of pre-owned vehicles, many of which have extended warranties thanks to manufacturers' Certification Programs. These, and all of our other pre-owned vehicles, are showcased at [www.fieldspreowned.com](http://www.fieldspreowned.com/). Our Service Departments excel in meeting the needs of our customers while maintaining the highest levels of customer satisfaction. You can schedule appointments online by [clicking here](http://www.fieldsauto.com/locations/service-locations.htm).

Please use this website to search for new and used cars, trucks and SUVs. You can also receive an appraisal estimate on your current vehicle, schedule a test drive, inquire about service appointments, or even browse for special offers and money saving coupons from all of our departments, such as new car, used car, finance, parts and service.

Everyone who purchases or leases a vehicle from Fields Auto Group is entitled to complimentary loaner vehicles with service appointments, as well as free car washes for the life of the vehicle. Our commitment to building long term relationships with our customers has enabled Fields to grow from a single store in 1971 to North America's premier luxury auto group. We specialize in ensuring that our customers get the right vehicle and packages not only for their driving needs and budget, but for their lifestyle as well.

![](https://www.fieldsauto.com/)

references.title: Overnight Test Drives  Fields BMW Northfield
references.snippet:
Overnight Test Drives Fields BMW Northfield

# Overnight Test Drives

"Fields All-Day, Your Way" 24-Hour Test Drive A vehicle purchase is an important one. That's why Fields Auto Group offers the All-Day, Your Way 24-Hour Test Drive Program. Take the vehicle home with you. See how it fits in the garage. Take it to the grocery store, drop the kids off at school, drive it to work. Wherever your day takes you, at the end of it you'll feel confident that the vehicle you're about to purchase is the best one for you, because you tested it - your way. Overnight Test Drives are subject to Management Approval, and a completed credit application may be required. If you're 25 or older, just provide a valid driver's license and proof of insurance prior to your test drive. Must reside within the dealership's market area. Not all models qualify for overnight test drives. Contact our sales manager to schedule your 24-hour driving experience. Leave your car at Fields BMW Northfield and take a New BMW out on the road. This test drive lasts for 24 hours and up to 50 miles.

And, while you're putting your potential next vehicle through the paces, just leave your current vehicle and our service team will open a zero-fee repair order with the following complimentary services:

- A full wash and vacuum
- Vehicle sanitization
- Multi-point inspection
- Check battery
- Inspect wipers
- Check coolant protection
- Inspect tires and adjust to proper pressure
- Top off fluids

properties.description: Group 1 Automotive is a publicly traded, multi-location automotive dealership group with over 260 franchised rooftops across the US and UK; it sells new and used vehicles from brands including Honda, Toyota, Nissan, Jeep, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Genesis, Jaguar, and Land Rover. The company has 1,784 employees (+11.8% YoY growth), generates approximately $22.6 billion in annual revenue, and has a market cap of $5.1 billion. It operates service and fixed-operations departments providing maintenance and repair services. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, founded in 1997, it is part of the Fortune 300. The brand mix includes Korean and luxury brands, with high warranty and service activity documented.

company.name: Group 1 Automotive
company.about:
We are a Houston-based, Fortune 300 automotive retailer. Since our initial public offering in October 1997, Group 1 has grown to become the third-largest dealership group in the United States and has expanded into the United Kingdom. The company achieved this success through a strategy that leverages management experience and emphasizes geographic and brand diversity, interrelated revenue streams, operational efficiencies, and the prudent deployment of capital.

Our Core Values:

Integrity – We conduct ourselves with the highest level of ethics both personally and professionally when we sell to and perform service for our customers without compromising our honesty.

Transparency – We promote open and honest communication between each other and our customers.

Professionalism – We set our standards high so that we can exceed expectations and strive for perfection in everything we do.

Teamwork – We put the interest of the group first, before our individual interests, as we know that success only comes when we work together.

evaluations.criterion: Brand mix includes Korean (Hyundai/Genesis/Kia) or luxury/German franchises, or shows documented high warranty/service-documentation activity

The presence of Hyundai/Kia/Genesis satisfies the Korean‑brand requirement, and Jaguar/Land Rover is a luxury brand, meeting the luxury/German‑franchise part of the criterion. Thus the company meets the criterion.

properties.content:
Corporate - Castle Automotive Group

[Our Reviews](https://www.glassdoor.com/api/api.htm?version=1&action=employer-review&t.s=w-l&t.a=c&format=300x250&employerId=2210737)

![](https://castleautomotivegroup.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Castle-Automotive-Group-Logo-v3-Round-2-768x402.png)

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/ShopCastleCars) [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/castleautomotivegroup/) [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/castleautomotivegroup) [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@drivecastlecars)

1 . About Us

# Castle Automotive Group

If you are looking to take your automotive retail career to the next level by joining a company that has an extremely stable team with longevity, vision, and abundant resources – look no further. Castle is committed to growing and recruiting the best and brightest in the automotive industry. We work tirelessly to redefine the retail experience with cutting edge technology that helps our teams succeed and deliver our customers a frictionless sales and service experience.

2. Our Employees

## Castle Culture

Our company culture is the foundation that fuels our success and growth. It not only attracts talented people – it strengthens skills and encourages the best quality of work. Grow your career with a modern and cutting edge automotive group and experience the Castle difference.

3 . Innovative Facilities & Technology Investments

# Where Innovation Meets Elegance

At Castle Automotive Group, we are redefining the modern dealership experience through facilities that prioritize luxury, comfort, and forward-thinking design.

From the complete renovation of previous projects like Castle Ford Lincoln of Michigan City to the upcoming ground-up developments for Genesis of Downers Grove and Castle Subaru of McHenry, each project demonstrates our ongoing commitment to delivering a premium automotive environment to the customers we serve.

### 17 Locations Across Illinois & Indiana

### Our Facilities

Each property on which the Castle Automotive Group’s operate are owned by the owners of the Group. With low LTV balances kept below a 40% threshold, our well capitalized structure allows us to keep our facilities at the highest image standards.

## Shop By Brand Of Choice

Pick your car - Build your deal - Delivered to your doorstep

Innovation and collaboration sets us apart - Shop 100% Online

5. Sell Your Car, Be Happy!

## Vehicle Acquisitions Services

The Castle Buy Center has 9 convenient locations in Illinois and Indiana with a dedicated team to walk you through every stage of the car selling process. Next time you’re searching to sell your vehicle, we guarantee you will have the best experience that leaves you driving happy. After 40 years of automotive experience, we want you to trust that our experts are knowledgeable, and there is no easier way to get cash fast for your car – whether it’s a car, SUV, or truck. Give us a call today with any questions you may have, and our car buying specialists will help you!

6. In-House Marketing

## Our Agency

Zero Friction Marketing is the full service digital marketing agency exclusively serving Castle Automotive Group as its only client in the automotive space. This award-winning agency delivers a frictionless, transparent experience for the CAG employees, as well as the dealership customers. Services include SEO & SEM, email marketing, social media management, reputation management, website management, and everything in between.

##### Training & Career Advancement

We are committed to providing opportunities for professional and personal growth for our team members.

##### Castle Is For Everyone

We are proud of our dynamic team's commitment to innovation for our organization's strength & growth.

##### Innovative and Dynamic Team

We are always looking for ways to make the car buying experience better – which means we are committed to making a difference in the automotive industry.

Join The Success

Castle Automotive Group has transformed the auto industry by adapting and embracing a diverse community of people who collaborate to achieve great things. We offer a professional environment with extensive training and growth opportunities, including performance-based development. Our team is seeking individuals with diverse backgrounds who are eager to join a rewarding, innovative, and collaborative workplace.

Career Opportunies

references.snippet:
Castle Automotive Group – Joe Castle, Chairman & CEO, Castle Enterprises

# Castle Automotive Group

# Castle Automotive Group

Castle Automotive Group is one of the largest privately held dealer groups in Midwest. Castle has 19 locations and 27 new vehicle franchises throughout Illinois and Indiana that represent multiple quality automotive brands such as Chevrolet, Cadillac, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Subaru, Kia, Ford, Lincoln, Buick, Volkswagen, GMC, and Mitsubishi. We are committed to revolutionizing the auto dealership shopping experience by delivering transparency and streamlining the customer experience.

We are committed to our employees from recruiting, training and career growth programs giving everyone opportunities to succeed. We thrive off of honest, educated and energetic people that have a desire to grow in this rapidly expanding automotive group. We offer competitive compensation plans and are always in need of top performers to join our team.

Mission: To provide our customers an easy, transparent car buying experience and help them find the best vehicle to fit their needs.

## Our Brands

## Our Facilities

### Castle Corporate Headquarters

At Castle Headquarters our mission is to become one of the largest privately held dealer groups in the United States. Our executive team and corporate staff is composed of some of the best and brightest minds in the automotive industry. We aim to develop eCommerce and digital marketing solutions that deliver our customers a frictionless car buying, selling, and vehicle servicing experience.

properties.description: AutoCanada is a publicly traded motor vehicle dealership group headquartered in Edmonton, Canada, with 64 dealerships in Canada and 13 in Illinois. It employs 411 staff (+2.6% YoY), generates $5.4B in revenue, and operates franchised dealerships for brands including Hyundai, Kia, Audi, BMW, and Mercedes-Benz. The company manages both new vehicle sales and service departments, with a strong presence in automotive retail and repair across multiple locations.

Automotive Dealership Group | AutoCanada Group

![Auto-Canada Logo](https://www.autocan.ca/wp-content/themes/convertus-platinum-autocanada/achilles/assets/images/auto-canada.png)

[(780) 732-3135](tel:(780) 732-3135)

[Get Directions](https://www.autocan.ca/get-directions/) [Call Us](tel:(780)%20732-3135)

## Join Our Team!

Competitive total compensation, meaningful and challenging work, an engaging and collaborative environment, recognition for performance and opportunities for growth and advancement!

## AutoCanada is Proud to Offer

#### Coast-To-Coast Dealership Network

[Comprised of 23 brands, in eight provinces across Canada. See our 64 dealerships. View Our Dealerships](https://www.autocan.ca/dealerships)

#### Search Our Vehicle Inventory

[With 23 brands across Canada. Come find your next vehicle! View Inventory](https://www.autocan.ca/vehicles/new)

#### Search Our Service Network

[Over 1,000 service bays across Canada to get your vehicle safely back on the road. View Our Service Network](https://www.autocan.ca/service)

## COAST-TO-COAST DEALERSHIP NETWORK

AutoCanada is a leading North American auto dealership group, operating franchise dealerships in 8 provinces across Canada and in Illinois, U.S. Through its extensive network, the company represents a wide range of automotive brands.

## SEARCH OUR SERVICE NETWORK

We’re here to help you keep your vehicle running its best and to offer sound advice whenever you need it. Our team of certified experts holds themselves to the highest standards, so you know that you are getting quality service. Remember that our commitment to superior customer service extends to all of our departments. When you bring your vehicle to an AutoCanada dealership you’ll see why we are Canada’s top choice for auto services and repairs.

[Visit Our Service Network](https://www.autocan.ca/service/)

Canadian Operations

AutoCanada's Canadian Operations segment operates 64 franchised dealerships across multiple provinces. The segment also includes three independent used vehicle dealerships and 16 stand-alone collision centres within its group of 32 collision centres. In 2024, the Canadian dealerships sold approximately 85,000 new and used retail vehicles. These collision centres provide opportunities to retain customers at every touchpoint within the automotive ecosystem.

U.S. Operations

AutoCanada's U.S. Operations segment, operating as Leader Automotive Group, operates 13 franchised dealerships in Illinois, USA. These dealerships offer a full range of new and pre-owned vehicles along with complementary automotive services tailored to the regional market.

evaluations.criterion: Operates service and fixed-operations (repair / multi-point inspection) departments at its dealerships
evaluations.reasoning:
AutoCanada operates service departments at its dealerships. Evidence from official sources:

- The All Dealerships page on autocan.ca explicitly frames the business as handling "From sales to service," indicating service operations at dealerships.

- The Dealer Partner/General Manager career page (investors.autocan.ca) states responsibilities to oversee, maintain and enhance the Sales, Finance, Service and Parts Operations at the dealership, explicitly referencing service operations.

- A 2019 press release about AutoCanada's partnership with DealerMine CRM describes increasing occupancy levels in the company’s service departments, confirming the existence of fixed-operations in practice.

Together, these sources support that AutoCanada operates service and fixed-operations (repair / multi-point inspection) departments at its dealerships.

References are the three official sources cited above.

Company Overview - AutoCanada Investor Relations

Skip to main content

## Company Overview

##### AutoCanada is a multi-location automotive dealership group operating in both Canada and the United States.

Our model enables us to serve a diversified geographic customer base and enjoy benefits not available to single location dealerships. AutoCanada trades under the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ACQ.

## Operations

AutoCanada’s Canadian segment, which is classified as continuing operations, consists of 64 franchised dealerships across Canada, representing 23 automotive brands in eight provinces. AutoCanada currently sells Acura, Audi, BMW, Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Dodge, Ford, GMC, Honda, Hyundai, Infiniti, Jeep, Kia, Mazda, Mercedes-Benz, MINI, Nissan, Porsche, Ram, Subaru, and Volkswagen vehicles. In 2025, its Canadian dealerships sold approximately 71,000 new and used retail vehicles.

AutoCanada’s Canadian segment also operates 33 collision centres (“Collision Centres”), supported by 26 Original Equipment Manufacturer (“OEM”) certifications spanning 37 vehicle brands.

AutoCanada’s U.S. Operations segment, operating as Leader Automotive Group, operates 10 franchised dealerships representing seven brands in Illinois, USA.

properties.description: Penske Automotive Group is a diversified international transportation services company and a premier automotive and commercial truck retailer. It operates a multi-location network of franchised new-vehicle dealerships with over 198 locations across various brands, including luxury German and Korean OEMs. Headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, the company has $31.8 billion in annual revenue, a $7.7 billion market cap, and employs 1,574 staff. Penske Automotive Group offers fixed-operations services such as repair and maintenance, and maintains a strong online presence with 59,423 monthly visits and a global rank of #630,316. It competes with firms like Midwest Peterbilt Group and Ford Motor, and is distinguished by its extensive brand mix and large-scale dealership footprint.

### About Penske Automotive

![](https://www.penskeautomotive.com/Areas/CMS/assets/img/hr-border.svg)

Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: PAG) is a diversified international transportation services company and one of the world’s premier automotive and commercial truck retailers. Headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, PAG operates dealerships principally in the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, Germany, and Italy and is one of the largest retailers of commercial trucks in North America for Freightliner. PAG also distributes and retails commercial vehicles, diesel and gas engines, power systems, and related parts and services principally in Australia and New Zealand.

references.title: Our Brands | Penske Automotive Group
references.snippet:
# Our Brands Through the Penske Automotive Group family of brands, we’re able to serve the diverse needs of our customers, worldwide.
...
#### Sytner Group
...
Sytner Group, including the Agnew Group, is one of the largest automotive retailers in the United Kingdom representing some of the world’s most luxurious brands. Sytner Group operates solely in the UK with Agnew Group operating in Northern Ireland. In group, Sytner employs almost 10,000 people across 150 plus dealerships and showcases 23 brands.
...
#### Premier Truck Group
...
Premier Truck Group offers a premium selection of new Freightliner, Western Star, Isuzu and Rizon commercial vehicles as well as a large selection of previously owned commercial trucks. Premier Truck Group also carries an extensive inventory of parts and accessories for new and used trucks and offers a full suite of maintenance and repair services at several locations across North America and Canada.
...
#### CarShop
...
CarShop offers high-quality used vehicles with up-front, no-haggle pricing and a money-back guarantee. Customers shopping online can use the innovative digital tools available on carshop.com from thousands of vehicles, obtain financing, and schedule delivery. Whether purchasing in-store or completely (100%) online, CarShop offers car buyers a seamless shopping experience.
...
Penske Logistics
...
Penske operates in Australia and New Zealand through leading on- and off-highway businesses, including Penske Australia, Penske New Zealand, and Penske Truck Rental. We distribute commercial vehicles from Western Star Trucks, MAN Truck & Bus, and Dennis Eagle, as well as diesel engines, gas engines, and power systems from mtu, Detroit, Allison Transmission (AU only), DEUTZ, and Sauer Compressors (AU only) with related parts and service support. We also offer convenient and professional truck rental and leasing services.
...
#### Penske Italy
...
Penske Automotive Italy established its presence in the Italian market in 2012 and is now the leading car dealership group in the premium - luxury segment in Italy, representing top brands including Audi, BMW, Ferrari, Maserati, Mercedes-Benz, Mini, Lamborghini, Porsche, Land Rover and Volvo. Penske Automotive Italy operates on the Italian Market with a team of 810 employees across 25 locations and annual revenues of approximately 1 billion Dollars.
...
#### Penske Sportwagen Hamburg
...
Penske Sportwagen Hamburg GmbH is the official authorized dealer for the luxury car brands Ferrari and Lamborghini. With its location in Hamburg and over 50 employees, it is a 100% subsidiary of Penske Automotive Europe GmbH, Mannheim.
...
#### Jacobs Gruppe
...
The Jacobs Gruppe has been one of the largest automotive trade groups in Germany for over 100 years. With almost 900 employees at 13 locations in the Aachen, Düren, Heinsberg and the Rhein-Erft district, it ranks as one of the largest employers in the local region. The Jacobs Gruppe is an official dealer and service partner for Volkswagen, Audi, SEAT, Škoda, CUPRA and Volkswagen Commercial Vehicles.
...
#### Nicole Group
...
The Nicole Group is a luxury automotive importer and retailer in the Kanagawa and Tokyo area in Japan with a strong heritage of excellent customer service and delivering vehicles with outstanding driving experience for over 40 years. Nicole is most known as the importer of BMW ALPINA for Japan, providing true masterpiece vehicles for customers all over the nation. Nicole employs almost 400 people across 15 locations representing BMW ALPINA, BMW, MINI, Rolls-Royce and Ferrari.
...
We’re proud to offer more than 30 brands of cars, trucks, SUVs and more through our nationwide network of Penske Automotive Group dealerships.

references.title: Penske Automotive Group
references.snippet:
Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (PAG) is an American transportation services company headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan. It operates automotive and commercial truck dealers principally in the United States, Canada, and Western Europe, and distributes commercial vehicles, engines, power systems, and related parts and services principally in Australia and New Zealand. Additionally, PAG owns 28.9% of Penske Transportation Solutions, a business that manages a fleet of over 400,000 trucks, tractors, and trailers. PAG is a member of the Fortune 500, Russell 1000, and Russell 3000 indexes.

Penske Automotive was founded as United Automotive Group in 1990 by Marshall S. Cogan and later came under the control of Penske Corporation and Roger Penske in May 1999. Several years later, on July 2, 2007, United Automotive Group changed its corporate name to Penske Automotive Group, Inc; and changed its ticker symbol on the NYSE to PAG.
...
In February 2009, General Motors declared its intent to part with the Saturn brand by closing or selling the division, either to investors or to dealers, as part of restructuring plans dependent upon the receipt of a second round of government loans (" bailout" funding). In June 2009, it was announced with much fanfare that Penske Automotive Group would purchase Saturn and its assets from General Motors. Less than four months later, on September 30, the deal collapsed as Penske announced it would terminate the deal with GM blaming manufacturing uncertainties with certain models.

# indiGO Auto Group

indiGO Auto Group facilities are timelessly modern and offer boutique experiences. Our customer experience is delivered with a “white glove” standard. Above all, our entire team is 100% dedicated to sharing our passion for the automobile with our existing and new customers. We strive every day to connect with our customers so that the passion of driving is never lost. IndiGO Auto Group is one of only a few dealership groups to provide the finest classic and collectible cars as well as new vehicles.

About indiGO Auto Group | Luxury Vehicles in the USA

# Welcome to indiGO Auto Group

---

indiGO Auto Group is a premier luxury automotive retailer, renowned for offering an unparalleled experience with the world’s most coveted brands, including Porsche, Rolls-Royce, Bentley, Lamborghini, McLaren, Aston Martin, Ferrari, BMW, Audi, Mercedes-Benz, Genesis, Hyundai, JLR, and VW. With an emphasis on sophistication and exclusivity, indiGO creates a boutique atmosphere within its state-of-the-art showrooms, where personalized service is the hallmark. More than just a dealership, indiGO caters to discerning enthusiasts, offering not only a curated selection of new and pre-owned vehicles but also bespoke automotive experiences. From exclusive events and track days to the acquisition of rare and limited-edition models, indiGO Auto Group delivers a lifestyle of refinement and elegance. Operating in some of the most distinguished markets across the U.S., indiGO is synonymous with luxury, community engagement, and the art of motoring excellence.

## We believe in one-of-a-kind ownership

Above all, we symbolize the power of a long-life passion for elite automobile brands that have no restraints and no limitations. That is why we are home to the most legendary cars that exist with notable style, incredible quality, and fine craftsmanship.

As of 2017, indiGO Auto Group became part of Pon, the number one car importer in the Netherlands. Since this acquisition, indiGO has continued to flourish, expanding its national footprint with a total of 30 current and upcoming locations across the United States, including California, Texas, Colorado, Missouri, and Arkansas. Each destination is led by a team of passionate automotive experts who combine deep brand knowledge with a genuine enthusiasm for the art of driving.

In 2025, indiGO Auto Group proudly announced its latest expansion with the acquisition of Mercedes-Benz of Palm Springs, Hyundai of Palm Springs, and Genesis of Palm Springs. These additions mark another significant milestone in indiGO’s mission to offer an even broader range of world-class automotive brands—uniting cutting-edge innovation, timeless design, and dynamic performance under one distinguished name.

indiGO Auto Group is an emblem of artisanship in perfect harmony with luxury, performance, and power. We represent the most sought-after names in the automotive world, including Porsche, Audi, Volkswagen, Bentley, Lamborghini, Land Rover, Jaguar, McLaren, BMW, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, Rimac, Ferrari, Mercedes-Benz, Genesis, and Hyundai. Whether it’s the exhilarating performance of a sports car or the refined elegance of a grand touring model, our dealerships cater to those who desire to bring a heart-pumping driving experience into their everyday lives. At indiGO Auto Group, we work tirelessly to create a truly unique automotive buying experience designed around our most important priority—you. From bespoke purchasing consultations to exclusive ownership experiences, we continue to redefine what it means to live the indiGO lifestyle: a celebration of passion, precision, and performance.

![](https://goauto-assets.imgix.net/Corporate/promotions-slider/image-7.png?auto=format&fit=crop&crop=entropy&ixlib=react-9.11.0)

#### Go Gives Back

---

With more than 5,000 employees, the Go Auto family has strong ties to every community where we do business. Giving back and being involved in the communities where we work is a core tenet at Go Auto. As a result, we have made over $27M in total charity and community donations since 2018. Go Auto believes in giving every child the opportunity to succeed in life, which is why we have a strong focus on children's charities. Notable initiatives include:

- Our on-going grant donation to the Thrive Foundation, supporting Thrive Elementary School
- $3M commitment to the Kids With Cancer Society
- Up to $1M donation to Fresh Hoops to refurbish basketball courts across Edmonton in partnership with the Edmonton Public Schools Foundation and Edmonton Stingers
- Our ‘Fuels the Schools’ program has delivered over 300,000 meals to school children
- $1M donation to the Hay River Sports Complex in the NWT

![A group of children sitting together, laughing and eating lunch](https://goauto-assets.imgix.net/Hero/2-GettyImages-1049273684.jpg?auto=format&fit=crop&crop=focalpoint&fp-x=0.5438&fp-y=0.423&ixlib=react-9.11.0)

### 70+ dealerships32 brands17,000+ vehicles

---

Starting from humble beginnings, our family-and Canadian-owned business has grown from one dealership to over 70 across Canada and the United States. Operating as a community-minded organization with a passion for providing unbeatable benefits not found anywhere else has driven our business since the start. That is why we offer benefits such as the Go Auto App, 7-day-a-week customer service, personal shopping experts, a 30-day exchange, no extra fees, and more.

![A view from inside a vehicle of a boy standing between a woman and man, holding hands and looking at the mountains](https://goauto-assets.imgix.net/Hero/3-GettyImages-547427750.jpg?auto=format&fit=crop&crop=focalpoint&fp-x=0.6293&fp-y=0.4725&ixlib=react-9.11.0)

## Shottenkirk Automotive Group

### 28 Locations in 7 States

About Us

## Serving Drivers In 7 States

### Your Source For All Things Automotive In Alabama, California, Texas, Georgia, Iowa, Florida & Illinois

Shottenkirk Automotive Group is honored to be the dedicated source for new and used car sales, financing, parts and services for many drivers across 7 states. Our dealership group consists of locations ranging from California to Georgia, and Texas to Iowa and Illinois and Alabama. With over a dozen full-service car dealerships, we’re home to new vehicles and used cars for sale from some of today’s top automakers, and we offer complete financing and auto care, too.

When you’re looking for competitive pricing on an immense selection of new cars, SUVs and pickups plus quality pre-owned options, turn to Shottenkirk Automotive Group and our array of dealership locations! Whether you’re after a brand-new Ford, Chevrolet, Honda, Toyota or Jeep, a low-priced used car or professional maintenance for your current ride, we’re here for you, so contact us today.

### What We Do: Extensive Selection Of New Cars, SUVs & Pickups

When it comes to offering a huge selection of cars, pickup trucks and SUVs from popular auto brands across state lines, nobody compares to Shottenkirk Automotive Group! Our family of dealerships stocks the latest models from more than a dozen car manufacturers, including such brands as Lexus, Ram, Kia, Buick and Dodge. Plus, with top-selling automakers like Toyota, Ford and Honda represented here, you’re sure to find the vehicle you’re after at one of our nationwide dealerships! We can orchestrate affordable vehicle shipping services should you find your ideal new ride at one of our other locations.

### Used Cars & Certified Pre-Owned Vehicles

If you thought we stocked an incredible array of new vehicles spanning many popular brands, then wait until you see our pre-owned inventory! At Shottenkirk Automotive Group dealerships, car shoppers can explore used and certified pre-owned (CPO) vehicles, as well as competitive used car specials that include autos from many manufacturers. When you’re shopping on a budget and after a great deal, you’ll find so many quality options here. So whether you have a particular make and model in mind or are searching for a top deal on a versatile SUV, shop our used vehicle inventory now!

### Professional Financing Assistance

No matter if you’re looking to secure a competitive loan package for a brand-new SUV with your excellent credit rating or you’ll need some assistance with your used car purchase through one of our alternative financing packages, count on the finance specialists at our dealerships. Regardless of which Shottenkirk Automotive Group location you’re planning to buy at, you can submit a secure financing application online now to discover your loan options in no time. Car shoppers who are considering leasing a new vehicle to enjoy a lower monthly payment can also view each of our dealerships’ latest offers online.

### Professional Auto Service Centers

At each of our auto group’s dealership locations, motorists will find a dedicated service center that caters to vehicles of all makes. Our teams of highly skilled technicians are not only factory-trained, but also ASE Certified to ensure we can tackle any maintenance or repair and deliver top-quality results. Even if you bought your current vehicle elsewhere, the service departments of Shottenkirk Automotive Group want to be your go-to source for professional and prompt auto care. Don’t wait to schedule a service appointment for tire service or an oil change, and see our specials to save money during your visit!

### Genuine & OEM Parts For Sale

The nationwide dealerships of Shottenkirk Automotive Group take automotive maintenance seriously; that is why we not only feature dedicated service centers, but parts departments, too. Quality car repair and maintenance only go so far if you’re not using high-quality parts, so count on us to treat your vehicle right with genuine and OEM components. Our parts specialists are here to DIY types, so if you’d like to request a new oil filter, wiper blades, brake pads or other items for your ride, don’t hesitate to reach out to our staff or order your parts online now.

### Shop Shottenkirk Automotive Dealers Online

Our user-friendly auto group website and individual dealership sites are available to all drivers, so why not locate your next vehicle of choice among our inventory and get pre-qualified for an auto loan today? We offer convenient online services, including vehicle trade-in appraisals and payment calculators as well as helpful resources related to our many car maintenance services. Shop the entire Shottenkirk Automotive Group in one place right now, here on our website, where there are thousands to pick, with just one click!

references.title: Why How Video MPIs Are Building Trust Boosts Shop Revenue
references.snippet:
# How video MPIs are building trust between dealerships and customers – Tom Druzynski | West Herr Automotive Group
...
Customers often find it hard to trust the service advice given by dealership staff, especially if they can’t see the issues themselves; as a result, they frequently decline recommended services. On today’s episode of Service Drive, Tom Druzynski, director of service operations at West Herr Automotive Group, joins us to share how his group is using video multi-point inspections (MPIs) to give customers a clear view of their vehicle’s condition, improve repair approvals, and build long-term trust.
...
According to Druzynski, West Herr equipped its 650 technicians with iPhones to record videos paired with electronic MPIs, allowing customers to see firsthand what repairs are needed, or, in some cases, that no work is required. He notes that videos are delivered via text or email, making it easy for customers to review and share with family members or trusted advisors.
...
> “Video is the perfect way to bridge the gap and to show that customer, ‘hey, listen, we just report the news,’ right? That's what we do in service. We don't spin it any direction."
...
At first, some technicians were resistant to the new process, expressing concerns about additional workload and requesting compensation. However, the advantages became clear very quickly. There was an increase in hours on repair orders, higher closing percentages, and faster approvals. Druzynski notes that video inspections have now become a standard practice throughout the service department.
...
Additionally, advisors receive guidance on effectively presenting videos, as the group collaborates with local colleges to integrate video MPI techniques into automotive programs, ensuring that technicians entering the industry are well-prepared to utilize the technology.
...
However, the shift comes as manufacturers, including Mazda and Audi, are beginning to require video documentation in their service programs, signaling broader industry adoption.
...
For dealers, video MPIs offer measurable advantages: increased service revenue, improved customer confidence, and enhanced efficiency. Druzynski said the investment in smartphones and training pays for itself quickly through higher repair order volume and faster approvals.

## Welcome to Pfaff Automotive Partners

Thank you for visiting the Pfaff Automotive dealerships, proudly serving Canada since 1964. Pfaff dealerships have worked to provide honest customer service to drivers like you from Thornhill and beyond. If you want fast, simple, and transparent car shopping, our group of dealerships delivers a one-of-a-kind experience to drivers across Canada. We want to be your preferred luxury auto group, and the Pfaff Automotive divisions will work hard to earn your business.

## What Sets Pfaff Automotive Dealerships Apart?

At a Pfaff dealership, you'll always get our best price first, there will be no hidden fees, you'll experience a streamlined shopping experience that values your time and intelligence, and you have the option to shop online 24/7. What's more, at Pfaff Automotive dealerships, we provide one-on-one financing support. Unlike other car dealership locations in Canada, you will not be passed from associate to associate.

Throughout the process, you will work with one associate from start to finish for a stress-free experience. The team member you work with will create a customized payment plan that meets your needs and budget. We're here to answer any questions you may have so you can make the most informed financing decision.

## Visit the Pfaff Automotive Divisions Today

We are a luxury auto group that truly puts the customer first. Check out our inventory today, or visit one of our stores to experience the Pfaff difference. The Pfaff Automotive divisions are here to take care of all of your automotive needs, from new car sales to maintenance and repairs. Reach out to us today for more information or if you are ready to start your car shopping journey at a luxury auto group you can trust. Visit any of our state-of-the-art car dealership locations near Richmond Hill or Mississauga today, and make your dream car a reality in no time.

references.title: Pfaff Automotive to retail Audi, Ducati under one rooftop - Canadian Auto Dealer
references.snippet:
Pfaff Automotive to retail Audi, Ducati under one rooftop - Canadian Auto Dealer
...
Automotive to retail Audi, Ducati under one rooftop
...
The first dual brand dealership in North America to retail Audi and Ducati under the same rooftop is expected to open in June 2026 in Vaughan.
...
Pfaff Automotive was chosen as the company to do it, and groundbreaking for the 100,000 square foot store (9,290 square meters), three-level building began a month ago. The store will be next to Pfaff’s Porsche Centre Vaughan.
...
Pfaff President and CEO Chris Pfaff told Canadian auto dealer that when his company acquired the land for the Porsche store, it tied up the property beside it, though it wasn’t 100 per cent sure it would be used to build an Audi store. Pfaff said his company had been looking at relocating its current Audi dealership for about seven years.
...
Pfaff said there are four other dealerships in the world retailing Audi and Ducati together. His company won’t be the first to sell cars and motorcycles in Toronto, Ontario, in the same building. BMW has been selling cars and motorcycles for many years at its downtown Toronto Motorrad store.
...
Pfaff said he was honoured when approached about the idea and that may have had to do with the company’s success selling high-end products. It also sells Harley-Davidson, though Pfaff emphasized Harley-Davidson and Ducati represent different buyers.
...
“I think (Audi) saw the opportunity,” said Pfaff. “Somewhat unique for Toronto is the real estate prices are so expensive commercially. When you’re looking for real estate for just regular car dealerships and also bike stores, you have to get really creative. I think that’s part of this as well. To make the real estate numbers work for the Ducati business, it makes a lot of sense to put it together.”
...
“It’s going to be really interesting in how we execute it,” said Pfaff. “The Audi is the volume thing, the big thing, and you’ve got to make sure the Ducati doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. You have to have the discipline to make sure you’re giving mindshare to the bikes, and you’ve got to have dedicated bike personnel because that’s all they will do, so that is step one. But it’s also senior management’s requirement to make sure they keep their eye on that Ducati business.”
...
The Ducati products will be sold on half of the upper floor.
...
“What I’m hoping for is you get a lot of people looking at new- and pre-owned Audis, and some of them might be open to looking at the bikes, so that’s when you’re hoping you get some spillover effect,” said Pfaff. “Obviously having a Porsche right next door isn’t going to hurt, either. That’s what we’re trying to recapture. It’s more important for Ducati to be part of this dual idea than it is for Audi.”

references.title: Oil Change Service in Toronto | Pfaff Automotive Partners
references.snippet:
Oil Change Service in Toronto | Pfaff Automotive Partners

OIL CHANGE SERVICE IN TORONTO

When it comes to maintaining your vehicle's performance and longevity, nothing is more essential than a regular oil change. At Pfaff Automotive Partners, we offer a comprehensive oil change service in Toronto, tailored to meet the needs of discerning drivers. Whether you drive a high-performance sports car, a luxury sedan, or a premium SUV, our certified technicians deliver meticulous care with OEM-approved oils and components.

As a trusted name in luxury automotive, we offer oil change services in the Greater Toronto Area for all makes and models, with a strong emphasis on performance, precision, and client satisfaction.

Service & Parts Tips

Contact Us

## How Often Should You Change Your Oil?

Understanding how often you should change your oil depends on key factors, including your driving habits, vehicle make, and the type of oil used. While many modern luxury vehicles can go 10,000 km or more between oil changes, we recommend reviewing your vehicle's owner's manual or consulting our service experts for guidance tailored to your specific model. As a general guideline:

- Synthetic Oil: Every 8,000 to 12,000 km
- Conventional Oil: Every 5,000 to 8,000 km
- Severe Driving Conditions: More frequent intervals may be needed

Knowing when to change your oil helps prevent engine wear and maintain peak performance over the life of your vehicle.

## Why Choose Pfaff Automotive Partners For Your Oil Change?

We provide a truly elevated oil change service in the Greater Toronto Area, offering more than just an oil swap--we offer a luxury service experience designed around your time and your vehicle's specific needs. Our oil change service in Toronto includes:

- Premium synthetic or conventional oil, based on vehicle requirements
- Genuine OEM oil filter replacement
- Multi-point inspection of key systems
- Tire pressure check and adjustment
- Complimentary vehicle wash (where applicable)
- Comfortable lounge with complimentary beverages and Wi-Fi

From start to finish, your experience with us is built on transparency, efficiency, and a standard of care that matches the luxury brand you drive.

## Schedule Your Oil Change Today

If you require oil change service in the Greater Toronto Area, Pfaff Automotive Partners is your premier destination. Our expert team ensures your vehicle receives the attention it deserves, with no detail overlooked.

references.snippet: Pfaff Automotive Partners is a multi-location Canadian automotive dealership group headquartered in Concord, Ontario, with multiple franchised new-vehicle rooftops including Audi, Ducati, Harley Davidson, Hyundai, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, and Porsche. It operates comprehensive service and fixed-operations departments with certified technicians, managing over 1,900 new vehicle listings across various OEM brands, emphasizing a diverse brand mix of luxury and Korean brands.

The “About Us” page explicitly states that the group represents over 20 auto brands, including those mentioned.  Additionally, the site’s warranty page documents a 6‑month/6,000‑mile limited warranty, roadside assistance, and complimentary oil changes for used vehicles, indicating documented high warranty/service‑documentation activity.  Both elements satisfy the criterion.

evaluations.reasoning: Yes. Kendall Auto Group operates as a multi-location dealership group with two or more franchised new-vehicle rooftops. Evidence: (1) The About Us page states Kendall represents 20+ auto brands across Idaho, Oregon, Alaska, Washington, and Montana, indicating multiple dealership locations. (2) The site lists franchised rooftops such as Kendall Ford Commercial & RV Service Center (Meridian, ID) and Kendall Nissan of Nampa (Nampa, ID), among others, plus Honda/Toyota locations across the Pacific Northwest. (3) LinkedIn notes 23 automakers at 45 dealerships across five states, confirming a broad multi-location footprint. (4) Kendall Auto Washington page shows multiple WA dealerships, reinforcing the multi-location, multi-brand model. Therefore, the criterion is satisfied.

references.title: Kendall Auto Group
references.snippet:
Kendall Auto Group is a Motor Vehicle Manufacturing company. Kendall Auto Group is a car dealership with 45 dealerships representing 23 automakers across Alaska, Idaho, Oregon, Washington, and Montana. They offer new and used cars, auto service, auto parts, and financing. Kendall Auto Group employs 216 people (+9.0% YoY, +43 people) and has an annual revenue of $10.0M, founded in 1937. Headquartered in Eugene, Oregon, United States, with presence in Australia and Canada.
...
Kendall Automotive Group is proud to represent 23 automakers at 45 dealerships across five states in the Northwest. We have been family-owned for 85 years and give back to our communities through our Kendall Cares Program. We represent many of your favorite manufacturers, including Audi, Acura, Ford, Chevrolet, Cadillac, BMW, Kia, Honda, Hyundai, INFINITI, Lexus, Nissan, Subaru, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, and many more! We sell new and used cars for you to find your dream car, and all qualifying pre-owned cars include Kendall Auto Protection, which provides benefits and a multi-point inspection. With our one-stop shopping, secure an auto loan with our Finance Center. We also offer car repair and parts at our Service Center. Stop by one of our dealerships in Oregon, Alaska, Idaho, Washington, or Montana today!
...

Kendall Auto Group is proud to sell and service Ford, Chevrolet, Subaru, Mazda, Toyota, Volkswagen, Honda, Kia, and other vehicles in Eugene, Bend, and Prineville, Oregon; Fairbanks, Anchorage, Wasilla, and Soldotna, Alaska; Nampa, Meridian, and Boise, Idaho; Marysville and Vancouver, Washington; and Bozeman, Montana. With models like the new Ford F-150, Toyota Highlander, and Kia Optima, we have something for every taste. Browse our new car inventory to check out the model you’ve been eyeing. If it’s a used car, truck, or SUV you’re looking for, Kendall Auto Group has a huge selection of used cars and Certified Pre-Owned cars at our Pacific Northwest dealerships.
...
Kendall Auto Group also offers online car buying to make your experience safe and easy. Shop for a new or used car in Alaska, Oregon, Washington, Idaho, or Montana from the comfort of your own home. We’ll even bring it to you so you can get the full experience with a test drive. Take your time to make your final decision; then, once you do, our team will deliver your vehicle and the final paperwork to your home to make it official.
...
## FIND AUTO SERVICE
...
OUR DEALERS
...
Our Kendall Auto Group Service Centers are in the business of keeping you on the road. Whether you need an oil change, brake check, or anything else, our service technicians will get you back on the road in no time. Visit your nearest Kendall Auto Group Parts Centers to get help with your next project or upgrade. Our parts specialists can help you find the right parts for the right project from OEM parts to aftermarket parts.
...
Need financing for your new or used car purchase? Be sure to come by our Kendall Finance Center to see our financial experts about securing a car loan. No credit? No problem! Our finance teams specialize in good credit, bad credit, or no credit car loans. Complete our online car loan application and even estimate your monthly payments with our car loan calculator. Our finance specialists will assess the trade-in value of your current car if you choose to sell your car to us. We look forward to helping you secure an auto loan for your new or used car.
...
Kendall Auto Group is a family-owned and operated group of automobile dealerships which have been serving the Pacific Northwest since 1937. As one of the largest privately owned auto dealership groups in the Pacific Northwest, Kendall represents over 20 auto brands in Idaho, Oregon, Alaska, Washington, and Montana. #### About Us

## Krause Auto Group

Since 1991, the Krause Auto Group has been proud to serve communities throughout Florida, Georgia, South Carolina and North Carolina. As a family owned and operated collection of dealerships, we strive to go above and beyond to make our customers feel valued.

Each of our 28 dealerships work to drive positive change in their local communities through charitable outreach programs. Whether you are looking for a new or used car, truck or SUV, or to service your vehicle, Krause Auto Group is here to serve.

references.snippet:
Krause Auto Group | Family-Owned Dealerships Across GA, NC, TX, FL & SC

# Our Group

# About the Krause Auto Group

Welcome! The Krause Auto Group is a family-owned network of dealerships spanning Georgia, North Carolina, Florida, and South Carolina.

Founded in 1991 by CEO and owner Vernon Krause, the company began with a single store—Krause Family Ford. Since then, it has expanded to 28 dealerships and over 1,800 employees across four states. Former Vice President and partner Dan Parks played a vital role in this growth. He initially managed stores in Atlanta before relocating to Huntersville, NC, in 2002 to operate Huntersville Ford. Over time, he also oversaw Anderson Ford, Asheville Ford Lincoln, Myrtle Beach Mercedes, Myrtle Beach BMW, Hyundai of North Charleston, Hyundai of Venice, and Mercedes-Benz of Atlanta Northeast. Dan’s contributions were instrumental in shaping the Krause Auto Group, and we remain deeply grateful for his lasting impact on our organization.

Each Krause Auto Group dealership has its own unique personality, shaped by the brands we offer, the communities we are a part of, and the customers we serve. We have a great selection of brands including Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Nissan, Lincoln, Genesis, Volvo, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Aston Martin, McLaren, Lamborghini, Lotus, Rolls-Royce, and Koenigsegg.

We have a great selection of new vehicles, pre-owned vehicles, certified pre-owned vehicles, and commercial vehicles. Also, our service parts, and body shop departments offer an array of express service, mechanical and electric service, body work, accessories, wholesale parts, mobile service, and pickup and delivery.

No matter which dealership you choose, our commitment remains the same—we believe in being customer-centric, making your sales and service experience effortless, and being a trusted resource for all your automotive needs. We are constantly evolving to make your experience easier and faster, offering competitive financing, top-tier service, and genuine OEM parts. At Krause Auto Group, we go beyond the typical dealership experience to ensure you receive first-rate care at every step.

On February 17, 2015, we lost our beautiful, loving and caring daughter, Angela, after a brief but courageous battle with cancer. Angie was diagnosed with a rare form of lung cancer (anaplastic lymphoma kinase, or ALK) three days after giving birth to her second child, Mason. When Angie passed, she left behind her three-year-old daughter, Ava, Mason, and her loving husband, Blake.

Angie was our youngest daughter, and was a wonderful sister to our oldest daughter, Jennifer, and our two sons, Matt and Zack. She became the General Manager of Cherokee Lincoln of Alpharetta after starting her career at Cherokee Ford in Woodstock and is still missed greatly to this day. To honor the memory of our late daughter, we changed the names of several of our stores to include her name.

Our Locations

To learn more about what makes the Krause Auto Group who we are, feel free to contact us online or give us a call today. We’ll be happy to answer any questions you may have about the vehicles we sell or the services we provide. The Krause Auto Group looks forward to serving you — we’ll see you soon.

About Our Group Dealership - Charlotte Group Dealer in Alpharetta GA - New and Used Group Dealership Fort Myers Charleston Myrtle Beach GA. About Group

# About Us

# About the Krause Auto Group

Welcome! The Krause Auto Group is a family-owned network of dealerships spanning Georgia, North Carolina, Florida, and South Carolina.

Founded in 1991 by CEO and owner Vernon Krause, the company began with a single store—Krause Family Ford. Since then, it has expanded to 28 dealerships and over 1,800 employees across four states. Former Vice President and partner Dan Parks played a vital role in this growth. He initially managed stores in Atlanta before relocating to Huntersville, NC, in 2002 to operate Huntersville Ford. Over time, he also oversaw Anderson Ford, Asheville Ford Lincoln, Myrtle Beach Mercedes, Myrtle Beach BMW, Hyundai of North Charleston, Hyundai of Venice, and Mercedes-Benz of Atlanta Northeast. Dan’s contributions were instrumental in shaping the Krause Auto Group, and we remain deeply grateful for his lasting impact on our organization.

Each Krause Auto Group dealership has its own unique personality, shaped by the brands we offer, the communities we are a part of, and the customers we serve. We have a great selection of brands including Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Nissan, Lincoln, Genesis, Volvo, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Aston Martin, McLaren, Lamborghini, Lotus, Rolls-Royce, and Koenigsegg.

We have a great selection of new vehicles, pre-owned vehicles, certified pre-owned vehicles, and commercial vehicles. Also, our service parts, and body shop departments offer an array of express service, mechanical and electric service, body work, accessories, wholesale parts, mobile service, and pickup and delivery.

No matter which dealership you choose, our commitment remains the same—we believe in being customer-centric, making your sales and service experience effortless, and being a trusted resource for all your automotive needs. We are constantly evolving to make your experience easier and faster, offering competitive financing, top-tier service, and genuine OEM parts. At Krause Auto Group, we go beyond the typical dealership experience to ensure you receive first-rate care at every step.

On February 17, 2015, we lost our beautiful, loving and caring daughter, Angela, after a brief but courageous battle with cancer. Angie was diagnosed with a rare form of lung cancer (anaplastic lymphoma kinase, or ALK) three days after giving birth to her second child, Mason. When Angie passed, she left behind her three-year-old daughter, Ava, Mason, and her loving husband, Blake.

Angie was our youngest daughter, and was a wonderful sister to our oldest daughter, Jennifer, and our two sons, Matt and Zack. She became the General Manager of Cherokee Lincoln of Alpharetta after starting her career at Cherokee Ford in Woodstock and is still missed greatly to this day. To honor the memory of our late daughter, we changed the names of several of our stores to include her name.

To learn more about what makes the Krause Auto Group who we are, feel free to contact us online or give us a call today. We’ll be happy to answer any questions you may have about the vehicles we sell or the services we provide. The Krause Auto Group looks forward to serving you — we’ll see you soon.

- Drive With A Purpose
